task_completion.description: Log into the Splunk web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Splunk web interface dashboard is visible, indicating successful login.
The Splunk Field Extractor or Settings > Field Extractions page shows an extraction named 'error_severity' being created or already existing for the 'apache_error' sourcetype.
The Splunk Field Extractor or Settings > Field Extractions page shows an extraction named 'log_client_ip' being created or already existing for the 'apache_error' sourcetype.

task_completion.description: Perform a search for a statistical breakdown using the extracted fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Splunk Search app shows a query querying the 'web_logs' index and using the 'error_severity' and 'log_client_ip' fields (e.g., using 'stats' or 'timechart'), with results visible.

task_completion.description: Save the search as a report named 'Apache_Error_Analysis'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As Report' dialog showing the name 'Apache_Error_Analysis', a success message confirming the report was saved, or the report listed in the Splunk Reports tab.

integrity.description: The agent used the Splunk web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Splunk GUI in a web browser, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The field extractions are applied to actual log data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Field Extractor or search results show actual Apache log events with the fields highlighted or extracted correctly.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The work is done within the Splunk application, not in a text editor like nano or gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target index is 'web_logs' and the sourcetype is 'apache_error'. The expected field extractions must be named exactly 'error_severity' and 'log_client_ip'. The final report must be saved with the exact name 'Apache_Error_Analysis'. Splunk credentials are admin / SplunkAdmin1!.
